stimulus: While sound generally travels faster through dense materials, it can slow dramatically when forced to pass through certain engineered structures. One such structure is a periodic lattice known as a phononic crystal ______blank Japanese engineer Sayaka Ishida recently used such a crystal to reduce a noise pulse to roughly one-tenth its original speed.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The two clauses ("One such structure...(PnC)" and "Japanese engineer...original speed") are independent. A semicolon correctly joins two independent clauses with no conjunction.

Choice B is incorrect because a comma alone creates a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because the coordinating conjunction needs a preceding comma. Choice D is incorrect because the unpunctuated junction creates a run-on.
